summary: The South Bay's funding frenzy continues: Rhoda AI and Mind Robotics each landed $500M rounds, while chip-focused firms SiFive ($400M) and Nexthop AI ($500M) signal strong investor appetite for AI infrastructure. Across Santa Clara, San Jose, and Palo Alto, at least 25 companies closed funding in the past six weeks. Meanwhile, hiring remains solid—seven local firms are actively recruiting, suggesting confidence outlasts the capital influx.
